title: Amtech T1885 4-Digit Adjustable Combination Padlock
features: DURABLE AND VERSATILE: Suitable for a wide range of security applications, this 4-digit adjustable combination padlock has a weatherproof textured powder coated finish and an 8mm shackle that adjusts from 30-65mm
DURABLE DESIGN: Built to withstand regular use in demanding environments
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your security requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
